title: Simple Golden+
description: This project adds custom golden items including, Golden Potato, Enchanted Golden Potato, Enchanted Golden Carrot.                                     planning to add more gold types (different datapack)
body:
# Simple Golden +
![Simple Golden + Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b20f1c8d26e9e1659df7ae92b2325eb07db3c4a7.png)
## Dependencies
You need to install the **[Simple Golden+ Resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/project/UOMUGdIf)** for this Datapack to work.


## About:
Simple Golden + is a passion project I originally made for my friend group's smp, after making the original golden potato, I realized I really like making custom foods, so I added more. In the future I plan to add more gold types.

## Custom Textures
![Golden Potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39e56fbc34a10d7dd8509241843a816e814aeaa9.png) Golden Potato

![Enchanted Golden Potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39e56fbc34a10d7dd8509241843a816e814aeaa9.png) Enchanted Golden Potato

![Enchanted Golden Carrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a146f33d2a5dca28dc8d77ce071565759837519d.gif) Enchanted Golden Carrot


<details>
<summary>Message From Me O:</summary>

I hope you like this datapack: will be adding more soon ~!

Send me suggestions on my discord _**@frogii_panda**_ :P 
</details>
